title: デビュー戦の後に・まだ見ぬ景色へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka returns victorious from her debut
race, with the scenery from the lead burned into
her memory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's not enough for her—she yearns to see
even more breathtaking scenery in other races.
